items.headline: Expert Warning: America’s Grid Is So Far Behind, Blackouts Are Coming Even Without AI
items.summary: Dan Dreyfus, founder of Borneite Capital, warned on the All-In Podcast that America’s grid is in such poor shape that blackouts, when power is completely lost, and brownouts, when voltage is reduced, and electricity becomes less reliable, are coming from ordinary electrification alone. items.headline: Is AEP’s OVEC Restructuring And Data-Center Load Surge Altering The Investment Case For American Electric Power Company (AEP)?
items.summary: In April 2026, the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission approved, and on June 1 American Electric Power Company completed, a multi-part transaction shifting Ohio Power Company’s OVEC power entitlement to AEP Generation Resources and its OVEC equity stake to the parent company. This restructuring concentrates OVEC-related ownership and contracts higher in AEP’s corporate structure, which could affect how the company manages legacy generation exposure, regulatory oversight, and future capital...
